rationale: Educ. Code §44.011 governs school district declarations of financial exigency. It sets no tax rate, revenue floor, or exemption level. Increasing the homestead exemption may indirectly affect district finances but does not conflict with this procedural statute.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district may adopt a resolution declaring a financial exigency for the district.
_note: No direct conflict. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) does not alter or contradict any operative provision of Educ. Code §44.011.
